Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Lives up to its name!! So delightful. Made it through the first technical crux on the blankf ace, which was super interesting, but biffed it under the first big roof at the end of the slab because I pumped out and misplaced my feet. Fell another time right after the burly, juggy undercling. The stretch from the last clip to the anchors is easier than it seems! Definitely a 5 star climb!

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Early crux to a jug haul with interesting movement. Fun to onsight!

What an INCREDIBLE line!!! Fell right before I finished the crux sequence after clipping the last crux draw. Fell a couple times after that due to pump, but oh my GOD the movement is so good!! Belayed by the guy in the guidebook photo for this very climb :o Would be stoked to come back for a rematch on this puppy.

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe., Yoyo Li.
Notes: Fell on the third bolt a couple times trying to suss out the right sequence. Interesting beta and movement! Really weird getting to the anchor for both of these climbs, definitely detracts from the quality.

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe., Yoyo Li.
Notes: Fell just below the anchor because I tried to go direct, but you actually dodge well out right to avoid the face. Got it no problem after I went the right way!

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Super fun, thin crux! Pretty happy to pull this one off

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Pretty easy, but a good warmup! Trickier than the grade woudl lead one to believe
